text:
Fortress (lit. , rom. Purizun) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It permanently protects one page of restricted slot cards against theft or destruction by other spells.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This spell protects all cards in the slots of one binder page against theft or destruction by spell permanently, as long as the cards remain in their slots. The page must be one of restricted slot cards.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1035 :: 
指定したページのポケット入っているカードは、ポケットに入っている限り永続的に呪文による奪取・破壊の対象にならない。（指定できるページは１から１１までのいずれかに限り、フリーポケットのページは選べない。）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1035 :: Fortress 
Designated pocket pages that are occupied, as longs as the pockets remain occupied cannot be the target of spells effecting being taken/destroyed. (You can specify a page for protection from 1 to 11. Free Pocket pages cannot be chosen.)
|}

Trivia

Nickes' Alliance wanted to obtain one more copy of "Fortress" before exchanging their 40 spell cards for "Angel's Breath".
